hero.name: Ogi Yatri Malakiano
hero.description: I've shipped production apps used by Kemendagri, DPR RI, and national organizations — the kind where real users depend on them daily. Currently building at Solusi Teknologi Kreatif, South Jakarta.

about.title: A bit about me
about.subtitle: who's behind the keyboard
about.description1: I grew up in Padang, West Sumatra and studied Computer Engineering at Universitas Andalas — graduated Cumlaude, which still surprises me a little. Moved to Jakarta right after and joined Solusi Teknologi Kreatif.
about.description2: Most of what I've built runs inside slow government networks with strict uptime requirements — that's what made me obsessive about observability, structured logging, and keeping APIs lean under real load.

contact.title: Say hello
contact.subtitle: let's build something together
contact.description: Open to full-time roles, freelance projects, and the occasional late-night tech debate. Drop me a message — I reply to everything.

form.name: Your name
form.subject: What's this about?
form.success: Got it — I'll get back to you soon.

footer.builtWith: Built with Next.js & a lot of coffee
